values.label: Owns
values.description: Entity has ownership or stewardship over another entity.

values.label: Participates in
values.description: Person, brand, or product participates in an event or topic.

values.label: Sponsors
values.description: Entity sponsors another entity, event, or initiative.

values.label: Related to
values.description: General editorial relationship when a tighter type is not justified.

values.label: Competes with
values.description: Entities operate in overlapping markets or topics.

values.label: Mentions
values.description: Source or entity references another entity.
